tool_purpose: Hokkien unit HiFiGAN based vocoder from fairseq. Trained with TAT-TTS data with 4 speakers in Taiwanese Hokkien accent. Framework: Fairseq. Functionality: Text-to-Speech. API call: load_model_ensemble_and_task_from_hf_hub('facebook/unit_hifigan_HK_layer12.km2500_frame_TAT-TT').
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
doc_snippets: Hokkien unit HiFiGAN based vocoder from fairseq. Trained with TAT-TTS data with 4 speakers in Taiwanese Hokkien accent. Framework: Fairseq. Functionality: Text-to-Speech. API call: load_model_ensemble_and_task_from_hf_hub('facebook/unit_hifigan_HK_layer12.km2500_frame_TAT-TT').
